evidence_cited.summary: HK-0001 carried status=responded with resolution_summary already populated naming DEC-0002 and Phase 2 amendment, but lacked closed_at
HK-0002 status was classified but DEC-0007 ratified the underlying methodology change; needed promotion to responded with resolution_summary citing DEC-0007

description: Audit-trail hygiene: promote HK-0001 status from `responded` to `resolved` (closed_at set; resolution_summary already present from prior session); promote HK-0002 status from `classified` to `responded` (responded_at set; resolution_summary added citing DEC-0007 ratification and Sprint 9 commit 98cfa49 schema-port closure). Per henkaten-detector recommendation (this fan-out) and §3 audit-chain completion requirement. Both updates are append-only-equivalent jsonl field rewrites within `.council/` working directory; fully reversible via git revert.
